Figure 1

Sample images from a time course experiment. The upper row corresponds to a 30 minute time point

and the bottom row to a 90 minute time point. The columns (left to right) correspond to brightfield,

YFP and CFP images.  Cell-ID finds and identifies cells in the brightfield images with high efficiency,

gives them a unique ID number that it maintains for that cell through the time course, and copies the

cell location over to any number of fluorescence images. Image from Gordon et.al, 2007.
